rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type contracts in component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use only visible identifiers in AGREE expressions
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
generic_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks at the appropriate scope level
Ensure all referenced identifiers in AGREE expressions are visible in the current scope
Preserve the existing AADL architecture during model fusion
Use only valid AADL and AGREE syntax in generated contracts
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assume` and `guarantee` for assumptions and guarantees
Use `eq` for equation declarations and `const` for constant declarations
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE expressions
Do not place assumptions and guarantees that refer to component ports in invalid scopes
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
